series_metadata.series_description: Documents generated by the Department regarding a company in rehabilitation or liquidation or other companies involving complete records collections for litigation purposes. Records include the inventory logs and privilege logs.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 1 year after the estate/case is settled and no pending litigation against the Department exists; then destroy. [See Attorney General before destroying.] ; Electronic: Retain 1 year after the estate/case is settled and no pending litigation against the Department exists; then destroy. [See Attorney General before destroying.], Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
